name: Twelve Seas Investment Co III/Cayman
summary: PART I . Overview We are a blank check company incorporated on August 14, 2024, as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. While we may pursue an initial business combination target in any business, industry or geographic location, we intend to focus our search on global companies located outside the United States...
